calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for Court trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing on this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Janet Pond.
Jak Marquez, Esq. for Plaintiff: Canyon Pacific Management Company, Inc. Plaintiff's witness: Doby Tapia, was sworn and examined. No appearance by Defendant, Eduardo Garcia AKA Eduardo Garcia Torres.
Exhibit 1---Rental Agreement----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Notice for nonpayment of rent---------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3---Proof of Service-----------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Canyon Pacific Management Company, Inc. as follows:
Restitution and possession of premises located at 1029 Geary Street, Unit #48, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of lease. Costs pursuant to memo of costs.
Past due rent: $1,200.00
Holdover damages: $4,680.00
for a total of $5,880.00
Counsel stipulated to the return of Exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Off Calendar

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar Feb-15-2006 Denied
